nodes.name: Telegram reply received
nodes.notes:
Telegram API credential created in n8n's UI (Overview > Credentials tab > Telegram API, paste your bot token there — not under the Settings gear menu) — n8n stores it encrypted, separate from this file.

IMPORTANT: this is a WEBHOOK trigger — Telegram must be able to reach this n8n instance over the public internet for messages to arrive at all. Solved via Tailscale Funnel — see docs/TAILSCALE-SETUP.md. n8n's WEBHOOK_URL env var (in ops/launchd/com.jramirez.avatar.n8n.plist) must match the Funnel hostname for the webhook registration to use the right public URL.
